antipattern.description: `from apps.users.models import User` and `from apps.orgs.models import User` in the same module.
antipattern.reason: Second import shadows first; bug only fires when both code paths execute.
Hides scope; defeats IDE introspection; ruff unused-name detection broken.

antipattern.description: isort treats apps/* as third-party; group order wrong; diffs noisy.
antipattern.reason: Reviewers learn to ignore import diffs; the convention dies.

antipattern.description: `from apps.x.models import Y` used only in annotations, imported at runtime.
antipattern.reason: Startup time grows; risk of runtime circular import. TCH catches it.
Brittle; rename breaks chains. Use absolute aliased imports.
